CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Oct-14-2022 Off Calendar

Progress Report On The Purchase Of The Structured Settlement Annuity For The Minor, Vy Nguyen
Off Calendar Sep-29-2022 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-19-2022 Continued To Nov-08-22 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Petition For Approval Of Compromise Of Claim Of Action Or Disposition Of Proceeds Of Judgment For Minor Or Person With A Disability
Off Calendar Jun-30-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for hearing on the Petition to Approve Compromise of the Claim or Action of the Minor, Vy Nguyen.
Dept. 514. Judge: Michelle Tong. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings recorded by "For the Record" commencing at 9:40 a.m.

Larry Q. Phan, Esq. appeared with petitioner Anh Nguyen, who was present as Guardian ad Litem for the minor, Vy Nguyen, who was also present.
Petitioner and the minor were placed under oath and testified.
Mr. Phan, petitioner and the minor all appeared via ZOOM for this morning's hearing.
Order appointing Anh Nguyen Guardian ad Litem for the minor was filed July 16, 2020.

On the basis of evidence received, and good cause appearing, the Petition is granted and the Compromise is approved as follows:

Settlement Amount - $65,000.00.00.
Attorney Fees - $15,427.48.
Medical Bills/Liens - $930.00.
Costs - $2,360.10.

The balance of $46,282.42 shall be used to purchase a Structured Settlement Annuity with United of Omaha Life Insurance Company, with guaranteed periodic payments to the minor as set forth in Attachment 8b(2) of the Order Approving the Compromise.

Matter is CONTINUED to September 29, 2022 at 9:00 a.m. for Progress Report on the purchase of the Structured Settlement Annuity.

Counsel for petitioner shall prepare the proposed Order Approving the Compromise and to Deposit Money and submit same to the Court for review and signature.

Proceedings concluded at 9:58 a.m.
